name: AstraProfile500LTIP
comment:
The Astra Profile500LTIP is a compact, versatile LT and IP65 LED moving profile, engineered to be bright and offer robust performance under any indoor and outdoor conditions. 
This unit boasts a stunning 25.000 lumen (fixture output with goniometer), ensuring exceptional brightness.

revision.text: Rev 025 - Extensive Spectrum Data - Open white adjusted on wheels
